name: Clone Repo Handler
summary: Backend handler that executes git clone operations and registers the result as a project
goals: Execute git clone operations securely with proper error handling
Register cloned repositories as projects in the system

specDetail.description: Exposes POST /api/projects/clone endpoint that runs git clone as a subprocess, tracks progress, and registers the cloned directory as a new project.

parameters.name: projectName
parameters.description: Target project name (optional, derived from URL)

constraints: Must sanitize repoUrl to prevent command injection in git clone
Must enforce disk space limits before starting clone
Must clean up partial clones on failure

acceptanceCriteria.given: a valid clone request with a reachable repository
acceptanceCriteria.then: the repository is cloned to disk and registered as a project with status 201

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
